title: Make Great Hires. Develop Great Teams.
text:
# Make Great Hires.  
Develop Great Teams.

### Pricing and plans to suit your business needs.

Unlock better hiring and talent outcomes with our science-based assessment, interviewing, and employee development solutions to make every hire a strategic asset and every team a powerhouse.

Request Pricing

Professional

**BEST FOR:** Small businesses to large enterprises who want to uncover candidate potential with comprehensive assessments backed by science. 
 

Request Pricing

 
**FEATURES:**

Access to our suite of assessments 
 

**Assess**

Reveal how candidates think, work, and grow with science-backed assessments

* All assessments: cognitive aptitude, personality, emotional intelligence, risk, and skills
* Intuitive, real-time results
* User-friendly assessment platform:
 * Collect resumes
 * Communicate with candidates
 * Provide candidate feedback
* Branded testing experience
* Standard ATS Integrations
* SSO and MFA for extra peace of mind

**SUBSCRIPTION:** 

* 12-month minimum contract
* Full subscription access
* Uncapped usage within your tier
* Multi-year and bundled offer discounts available 

**OPTIONAL ADD-ONS:**

* Assessments delivered in a range of languages

Professional+

**BEST FOR:** Small businesses to large enterprises who want comprehensive assessments, plus predictive interviews that make it easy to pinpoint top talent.  
 

Request Pricing

 
**FEATURES:**

Everything in Professional, **plus:** 
 

**Interview**

Say hello to faster, fairer, friendlier interviews

**Video Interviewing** ➜

* Shortlist up to 75% faster than traditional phone screening
* Engage candidates with branded welcome videos
* Use recommended templates or create your own interviews 
  

**Live Interviewing** ➜

* Ensure every live interview is a structured, stress-free success
* Access a vast library of ready-made questions and templates
* Keep all candidate results in one place  

**SUBSCRIPTION:** 

* 12-month minimum contract
* Full subscription access
* Uncapped usage within your tier
* Multi-year and bundled offer discounts available 

**OPTIONAL ADD-ONS:**

* Assessments delivered in a range of languages
* **Proctoring****:** Get that extra assurance with AI-powered session monitoring
* **Interview Intelligence:** Shortlist instantly with AI-powered scoring, transcripts, and summaries 

Talent Success Suite

**BEST FOR:** Mid-sized businesses to large enterprises who want to enhance hiring effectiveness, empower employee growth and bolster team performance. 
 

Let's Talk

 
**FEATURES:**

Everything in Professional+, **plus:** 
 

**Develop**

Build happy, high-performing teams and impactful leaders

**Develop™ by Criteria** ➜

* Drive team performance with science-backed insights  
* Empower managers with targeted coaching and strategies
* Improve engagement, retention, and organizational effectiveness 

**SUBSCRIPTION:** 

* 12-month minimum contract
* Full subscription access: test, interview, onboard & develop
* Uncapped usage within your tier
* Multi-year and bundled offer discounts available 

**OPTIONAL ADD-ONS:**

* **Proctoring****:** Get that extra assurance with AI-powered session monitoring
* **Interview Intelligence****:** Shortlist instantly with AI-powered scoring, transcripts, and summaries 

## Problems We Solve

Find out how Criteria helps companies of all sizes solve some of their most difficult business challenges. 

Discover More

### Award winning customer success, support and onboarding.

Criteria’s Customer Success and Support teams go above and beyond to help our customers get the most from their subscription. We provide all the tools you need to select the right assessments and interviewing tools, administer assessments, and interpret the results to enable you to make the best talent decisions. And perhaps most importantly, we support your candidates 24/7 to ensure they have a great assessment experience.

customer service represenative

## 
Better Science. Better Decisions. 
More Talent Success.

Request Demo
